title: CRDO Stock Credo Technology Group Holding (CRDO, $140.82) RSI Indicator left the overbought zone
author: tickeron_community
selftext: This is a signal that [CRDO](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CRDO/)'s price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor looked back and found 35 similar cases where [CRDO](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CRDO/)'s RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 25 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 71%.
